title: Commercial Appraiser
description: Robert Half is placing a Commercial Appraiser for a direct-hire role with a property valuation firm in the Orlando area. You'll assess commercial properties, prepare valuations, and support real estate transaction decisions. This remote position offers flexibility while developing a career in commercial appraisal.
responsibilities: Conduct commercial property appraisals and prepare comprehensive valuation reports
Perform market analysis and research comparable properties
Maintain detailed property records and documentation
Support transaction timelines and client communication
Ensure compliance with appraisal standards and regulations

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Real Estate, Finance, Appraisal, or related field
skills: Knowledge of USPAP and valuation methodologies
Proficiency with appraisal software and valuation databases

benefits: Continuing education support for license maintenance
